title: After Action Report: Kick Pass Stat Tracking Fixes
scope: Engine bug fix — kick pass yards double-counting and possession attribution

rationale.item: Fix a three-part bug where kick pass player-level stats (yards, attempts) diverged from team-level stats derived from Play objects. Player stats were overcounting yards on TDs and attempts were being attributed to the wrong team on turnovers.
Root cause: State mutation (`change_possession()`, TD yard override) happening before/after stat recording, creating inconsistencies between the two stat sources.

actions.description: Bug 1 fix (TD yards double-counting): removed pre-TD yard tracking (old lines 6868-6869) and post-TD adjustment (old lines 6879-6880); added single yard tracking line after the TD determination using final yards_gained.

Bug 2 fix (INT possession attribution): save throwing_team = self.state.possession before change_possession(), use it in the Play object's possession field; applied to both INT and INT-return-TD paths.

Bug 3 fix (fumble possession attribution): save throwing_team_fum before any fumble-related change_possession() call, use it in all three Play objects (defense recovers; offense recovers but turnover on downs; offense recovers, gain continues).

risk_posture: This same pattern likely exists in run fumble and lateral fumble paths but was not addressed in this fix (scope limited to kick pass tracking).

validation_claims.claim: Single-Game Trace (seed=42, Agnes Scott vs Air Force): attempts 18 vs 17 → 18 vs 18 (home), 8 vs 9 → 8 vs 8 (away); yards 274 vs 208 → 210 vs 208 (home), 218 vs 154 → 154 vs 154 (away).
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run seed=42 Agnes Scott vs Air Force and compare player vs Play-object kick pass stats.

validation_claims.claim: Batch Test (20 games, 40 team-sides): attempts exact match ~90% → 100% (40/40); yards exact match ~60% → 85% (34/40); yards unaccounted diff Multiple → 0.
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run a 20-game batch comparing player-level vs Play-object kick pass attempts and yards.

validation_claims.claim: The 6/40 remaining yards differences are all from the penalty system (pre-existing, separate issue)... These are NOT kick pass tracking bugs.
validation_claims.check_method: Inspect _apply_during_play_penalty() ordering relative to player stat recording.

non_actions.item: Penalty yard replacement divergence (_apply_during_play_penalty() replaces play.yards_gained after player stats are recorded)
non_actions.reason: This affects ~15% of team-sides per batch and is a broader penalty system design question, not specific to kick passes. All other play types (run, lateral) have the same characteristic.

non_actions.item: Applying the save-possession-before-mutation pattern to run fumble and lateral fumble paths
non_actions.reason: was not addressed in this fix (scope limited to kick pass tracking)

residual_risks: Known Remaining Issue: Penalty Yard Replacement — offensive penalty on KP completion: player has original yards, Play has 0 → player overcounts; defensive penalty: player has original yards, Play has penalty yards → slight mismatch.
The save-possession pattern likely exists (unfixed) in run fumble and lateral fumble paths.
open_hooks: Design principle established: "Save possession before mutating state" — any play that can change possession must save self.state.possession to a local variable before calling change_possession(), then use the saved value in the Play object.
section_headers_original: After Action Report: Kick Pass Stat Tracking Fixes
Single-Game Trace (seed=42, Agnes Scott vs Air Force)
Known Remaining Issue: Penalty Yard Replacement
unmapped_content:
Header: Commit 19b9b37. Problem Statement detail: Yards — player stats showed ~60-70 extra yards per game compared to Play object sums; the discrepancy tracked closely with TD play yardage. Attempts — one team would show +1, the other -1.

Bug 1 mechanism trace: 1. Breakaway check inflates yards_gained (e.g., 90 yards); 2. Line 6868: kicker.game_kick_pass_yards += 90 (pre-TD value); 3. TD check triggers: yards_gained = 100 - field_position = 64; 4. Line 6879: kicker.game_kick_pass_yards += (64 - total_yards) (adjustment); 5. Player total: 90 + (64 - 16) = 138 yards; 6. Play object: 64 yards; 7. Overcounting: 74 yards. When breakaway check inflated yards_gained beyond the actual TD distance, the player got both the inflated breakaway yards AND the TD adjustment.

Bug 2 mechanism trace: 1. Home team throws kick pass; 2. INT detected → change_possession() → state.possession = "away"; 3. Play created with possession = self.state.possession = "away"; 4. Result: Home's KP attempt counted as Away's play in the log; 5. Team-level: Home attempts -1, Away attempts +1.

Files Changed table: engine/game_engine.py, ~80 lines — moved yard tracking after TD check; saved possession before turnovers in 5 Play return paths. Design Principle: This ensures Play objects always record WHO initiated the play, not who ended up with the ball.
